basic_info.description:
👋 I'm Stanislav Temelkov — a results-driven software engineer focused on AI-powered solutions. I combine professional delivery with hands-on side projects, so I adapt quickly and ship modern stacks.

Recently I work with AI systems — large language models, automation workflows, and data-driven apps. I enjoy complex problems and turning ideas into practical, high-impact software.

I'm looking for opportunities where AI creates real business value.

Credentials: Microsoft Certified: Azure Developer Associate; published research on a developed mobile and web application.

projects.title: School Website
projects.description: This is the first project I tackled during a whole summer vacation. Everything happened slowly and unprofessionally, but this is where my interest started after I saw that I was able to recreate what was in my head.

projects.title: ITNEWSBG (WEBSITE)
projects.description: The ITNEWSBG website is part of my curiosity and drive to learn something new. The site was made with the goal of having a stream of information that I could provide to fans of IT news on the Internet.

projects.title: ITNEWSBG (APP)
projects.description: This mobile app was rewritten because of my passion to learn new things. My goal was not only to make my first mobile app, but also to add a new way to visit the website as well :)

projects.title: Company website
projects.description: This project was an order from the company Integrasek OOD, whose requirements were met to the letter in accordance with the goals of the project and the color range of the graphic designer. Every single part of the project was created by me including hosting, emails, etc.

projects.title: BLOG/SHOP WEBSITE
projects.description: The project was implemented according to the client's requirements, and later more functionalities and a catalog with a store were added.

projects.title: RELAX IN VARNA
projects.description: I participate in this project by accepting it ready and continue to maintain and develop it together with the owner of the site.

projects.title: Cryptoslam
projects.description: Bulgarian–US delivery for cryptoslam.io: cryptocurrency and NFT intelligence with real-time dashboards, investment guidance, and reporting. Built .NET features across PostgreSQL/MongoDB; provisioned AWS workloads and Dockerized crypto nodes whose feeds powered user-facing insights.

projects.title: SprintRay Cloud / RayWare Cloud
projects.description: Dental SaaS aligning dentists and designers around patient-centric plans; RayWare Cloud adds GPU-backed 3D rendering for supervised printing pipelines. Implemented Angular/.NET capabilities, owned PostgreSQL changes, tuned AWS-hosted services and partnered with QA/visual design to harden clinician tooling.

projects.title: Smart Internal System
projects.description: Internal Amexis workforce platform—timesheets, sick leave, hybrid work, surveys and documentation templates aimed at large enterprises. Angular plus .NET with PostgreSQL/Jira/Git delivery: implemented new capabilities, stabilised legacy flows and refined backlog stories alongside QA.

projects.title: FarmToFork
projects.description: Ministry of Agriculture program covering the farm-to-plate lifecycle—crop/livestock sourcing, logistics, farmers markets/CSA and restaurant channels. Built Angular portals and React Native field experiences on .NET/SQL/PostgreSQL with focus on scalable modules, architectural reviews, regulatory templates and QA-driven polish.

projects.title: Public transport — Varna
projects.description: Amexis modernization of municipal transport software for Varna—passenger journeys, operator consoles and integrations with resilient .NET services, PostgreSQL estates and Scrum/refinement rituals across a scaled international team.

projects.title: BDZ ticketing system
projects.description: Full-stack contributions on Bulgarian State Railways (BDZ) ticketing—channel expansion, pricing and inventory rules, and regression-safe releases while pairing with QA through Scrum refinements on Amexis’ .NET, SQL and PostgreSQL stack.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
technologies: AWS (ECS, Lambda, SQS, SNS, CloudFormation, EC2, clusters)
